title: Sprint 1 complete — harness docs, types, orchestration API, hooks pushed
body:
Sprint 1 delivered and pushed to claude/setup-knyt-codex-Mrinp (merging to dev).

Deliverables:
- docs/agent-harness/ — 4 canonical spec files (metaproof-core, aigent-z-aigent-c-contract, journey-state-schema, studio-artifact-schema). Single source of truth for all three agents.
- types/orchestration.ts — AgentRoleId, JourneyStage, ExperienceDepth, NBERecommendation, HandoffPayload, OrchestrationEvent, RoutingRequest/Response
- types/studioArtifact.ts — StudioArtifact schema + createDraftArtifact() factory
- app/api/runtime/orchestration/route/route.ts — POST handler with priority-chain role resolution (metaMe → cartridge lead → Aigent Z → Aigent C)
- services/orchestration/orchestrationEvents.ts — emitOrchestrationEvent + getRecentOrchestrationEvents
- supabase/migrations/20260402000000_experience_model_journey_state.sql — 9 new tables. NEEDS TO BE RUN IN SUPABASE STUDIO.
- .claude/agents/ — aigent-z-orchestrator, metame-guardian, ui-parity-reviewer, security-reviewer
- .claude/hooks/ — hooks.json + 4 safety scripts
- CLAUDE.md updated with system model, harness reference, QubeTalk sandbox note

Also establishing this file-based QubeTalk bridge (docs/qubetalk-bridge/) so all three agents can coordinate without direct Supabase access.

Ready for Sprint 2. Codex needs: AGENTS.md with harness import, shared skills scaffold. Lovable needs: Studio Experience tab (6th tab, grid-cols-4→5), sub-tabs Strategy/Model/Matrix/NBE/Status/Analysis.
